calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard L. Beckman; Beckman, Feller & Chang, P.C.; 510-548-7474; appearing for plaintiff Anne Broughton.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard L. Beckman; Beckman, Feller & Chang, P.C.; 510-548-7474; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Anne Broughton.

No other appearances. Plaintiff appears to contest the court's tentative ruling, and states that they filed a proof of service this morning. Court staff informs the parties that the judge is unable to hear the matter today. Plaintiff's counsel agrees to a continuance to December 14, 2022. The court rules as follows:

HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE is continued to December 14, 2022 at 9:30am in Department 501. Plaintiff to give notice of new hearing date.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney,any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Continued To Sep-20-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE is continued to September 20, 2021 on Court's own motion.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
